evaluation_method: 5 LLM Judges + Minority Override + G4 Originality Detection
campaign: MarbMarket - The First veDEX on MegaETH is Launching
mission: Explain the veDEX Model & Why MarbMarket Matters
best_content:
Been seeing these veDEX models pop up everywhere lately. Solidly, Aerodrome, now MarbMarket on MegaETH. Most people just see the hype. I see a different play.

A veDEX isn't just another DEX. It's a governance machine. Lock MARB, get voting power. Longer lock = more influence + more rewards. Projects pay bribes for votes, creating this insane incentive loop that flows back to lockers. That's the ve(3,3) model in action.

What makes MarbMarket different? Fair launch. No presale. No VCs. Just the community deciding where value flows. First veDEX on MegaETH. @RallyOnChain infrastructure that compounds over time.

Wonder how the early locker distribution will play out once bribes start hitting the system. Anyone else thinking about the long-term governance active here? x.com/Marb_market
qa_comments: Love how you're breaking down the ve(3,3) model beyond the hype. Fair launch on MegaETH seems like the right move for community governance.
The bribes-for-votes dynamic is fascinating - creates that incentive loop you mentioned. Excited to see how early lockers benefit as this plays out.
First veDEX on MegaETH with no VC backing? That's refreshing. Curious to watch how the governance distribution unfolds once bribes start flowing.
